component.name: Ori and the Will of the Wisps Randomizer
component.summary: Randomizer for the game Ori and the Will of the Wisps

description.p: A Mod for the PC version of Ori and the Will of the Wisps. It shuffles the location of items and adds more features to the original game. It even allows you to play with your friends in multiplayer sessions! This mod greatly improves the replayability of the game and is playable by anyone who has already finished the game once. For more advanced players, harder difficulties will ask you to progress by using more advanced movement options or glitches.
